text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. In a code review, team members carefully examine each other’s code before it is added to the main project. This process helps catch bugs and errors early, saving time and effort later on. Additionally, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing among the team. Junior developers can learn from more experienced colleagues, and everyone stays updated about different parts of the project. Most importantly, code reviews improve overall team quality by promoting clear, consistent coding standards. While they may take extra time, the benefits of fewer mistakes, better collaboration, and shared understanding make them a valuable practice for any team.
